data.title: ElevenLabs New Features: The AI Voice Platform Just Leveled Up
data.excerpt: ElevenLabs dropped major new features — from music generation to video tools. Here's why creators are switching to this AI voice platform. Try it free.

$media.alt: ElevenLabs New Features: The AI Voice Platform Just Leveled Up

children.text: *Disclosure: Some links below are affiliate links — I may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you. I only recommend tools I genuinely use and believe in.*
ElevenLabs Just Dropped a Wave of New Features — And Creators Should Pay Attention
If you haven't checked out
ElevenLabs

in the last few months, you're missing out on a platform that has quietly evolved from a "cool text-to-speech tool" into a full-blown audio and multimedia creation suite. I've been using ElevenLabs for a while now, and the pace at which they ship meaningful updates is genuinely impressive.

We're not talking about cosmetic tweaks or minor bug fixes. I'm talking about entirely new capabilities — sound effects generation, music creation, image and video tools, conversational AI agents, and a revamped production studio — all layered on top of what was already the best voice synthesis engine on the market.
This post breaks down every new feature worth knowing about, who benefits most from the platform, and why I think
signing up for ElevenLabs
right now is one of the smartest moves a content creator, marketer, or developer can make.
What Is ElevenLabs (Quick Refresher)

ElevenLabs is an AI-powered voice platform built around hyperrealistic speech synthesis. At its core, it turns written text into audio that sounds indistinguishable from a human speaker. But calling it "just a text-to-speech tool" would be like calling Canva "just a design app." The platform has grown far beyond that original mission.
Here's what the foundational feature set looks like:
Text-to-Speech
: Paste text, pick a voice, get studio-quality audio in seconds. The realism is remarkable — natural pacing, breathing, intonation shifts, and emotional nuance that makes listeners forget it's AI.
Voice Cloning

: Upload a few minutes of audio (or even just 30 seconds for the instant model), and ElevenLabs creates a digital replica of that voice. You can then generate unlimited speech in that cloned voice, in any supported language.
Multilingual Dubbing

: Translate and re-voice content across 29+ languages while preserving the original speaker's vocal identity. Imagine dubbing a YouTube video into Spanish, Japanese, and Portuguese — all in your own voice.
These features alone put ElevenLabs ahead of competitors. But the recent additions take it to a completely different level.
The New Features That Make ElevenLabs a Full Creative Suite

This is where things get exciting. Over the past several releases, ElevenLabs has rolled out features that transform it from a voice tool into a multimedia powerhouse. Here's what's new and why each feature matters.
Sound Effects Generation

Need the sound of rain on a tin roof? A sword being drawn? A crowd cheering at a stadium? ElevenLabs now generates custom sound effects from text prompts. No more digging through stock audio libraries or paying per-use licensing fees. You describe what you need, and the AI creates it.

For podcasters, video editors, and game developers, this is a game-changer. The quality is surprisingly good — clean, usable audio that integrates seamlessly into production workflows. I tested it by generating ambient city sounds for a short video project, and the result was indistinguishable from a real field recording.
Music Generation

Yes, music. ElevenLabs can now compose original music tracks from text descriptions. Describe the mood, genre, and tempo, and you get a usable track. This isn't going to replace a professional composer for a film score, but for background music in YouTube videos, podcasts, ads, or social media content? It's more than enough — and the tracks are royalty-free.

I've been using this to create intro music for podcast episodes, and the variety of styles it can produce (lo-fi, cinematic, electronic, acoustic) means I never hear the same track twice. It's a massive time-saver.
Voice Design

Voice Design lets you create entirely new, custom voices from scratch. You specify characteristics like age, gender, accent, tone, and speaking style, and ElevenLabs generates a unique voice that doesn't exist anywhere else. This is perfect for brands that want a distinctive sonic identity or game developers who need original character voices.

I created a warm, mid-30s British female voice for a client's explainer video series, and the client loved it so much they've made it their brand voice across all content. That level of customization used to require hiring a voice actor and booking studio time.
Conversational AI Agents

ElevenLabs now offers conversational AI — essentially, you can build voice-based chatbots and interactive agents powered by their speech technology. This opens up use cases in customer support, interactive storytelling, language learning apps, and virtual assistants.

The agents can listen, process, and respond in real-time with natural-sounding speech. For businesses building voice interfaces, this is a seriously powerful tool that eliminates months of development work.
Image and Video Tools

The platform has expanded into visual content as well. While still evolving, ElevenLabs now includes image and video generation capabilities, making it a more holistic content creation environment. The idea is simple: create your script, generate the voiceover, compose the music, and build the visuals — all in one place.
Productions and Studio Upgrades

The Productions feature (formerly Projects) has received significant upgrades. You can now work on longer-form content — audiobooks, multi-episode podcasts, course modules — with better editing controls, pronunciation adjustments, and multi-track support. The ability to fine-tune pronunciation of specific words, control pacing at the sentence level, and manage multiple speakers across a single project makes it practical for professional production work.
If you want to
explore all these features yourself
, the free tier gives you 10,000 credits per month — enough to genuinely test everything before committing.
Who Is ElevenLabs Ideal For?
One thing I love about ElevenLabs is that it doesn't pigeonhole itself into one audience. The platform genuinely serves a wide range of creators and professionals. Here's who benefits most:
Content Creators and YouTubers

If you produce video content, ElevenLabs gives you studio-quality voiceovers without studio costs. Need a voiceover for a B-roll segment? Generate it in 30 seconds. Want to dub your content into multiple languages to reach a global audience? Done. The
use cases for creators
are practically endless.
Podcasters

Between voice cloning, sound effects, and music generation, ElevenLabs covers nearly every audio need a podcaster has. I know podcasters who use it to create ad reads in brand voices, generate sound effects on the fly, and even produce "AI co-host" segments for variety.
Game Developers and Interactive Media

Voice Design and conversational AI make ElevenLabs a natural fit for game development. Creating dozens of unique character voices used to mean casting dozens of actors. Now you can prototype entire casts using AI-generated voices and iterate on dialogue without scheduling recording sessions.
Marketers and Agencies

Ad creatives, product demos, explainer videos, social media clips — all of these need voiceovers, and most marketing teams don't have a recording studio on standby. ElevenLabs lets you produce professional audio assets in minutes, test different voice styles for A/B campaigns, and localize content for international markets without hiring translators and voice actors separately.
Educators and Course Creators

If you're building online courses or training materials, ElevenLabs makes it easy to narrate content without recording yourself. You can clone your own voice and edit the narration by editing text — no more re-recording entire sections because you stumbled over a word.
Developers and Startups
With the
ElevenLabs API

, developers can integrate hyperrealistic speech synthesis into their own apps and products. The API is well-documented, reliable, and supports the full range of ElevenLabs features. If you're building an app that needs a voice, this is the fastest path to production-quality audio.
Pricing That Actually Makes Sense
ElevenLabs offers a tiered pricing structure that scales with your needs, and honestly, the free plan is more generous than most competitors.
| Plan | Price | Key Inclusion |
Free
| $0/month | 10,000 credits, TTS, Speech-to-Text, Sound Effects, Music, Voice Design, 3 Studio projects |
Starter
| $6/month | More credits, voice cloning access, longer generations |
Creator
| $22/month | Professional features, higher quality, priority processing |
Pro
| $99/month | Large-scale production, API access |
Scale
| $330/month | Enterprise-grade volume and features |
The free plan isn't a teaser with crippled functionality — it includes real access to sound effects, music, voice design, and the production studio. That's rare. I always
recommend starting with the free tier
to experience the quality firsthand.

For many solo creators, the Starter or Creator plans provide everything they need. Agencies and businesses with higher volume requirements will find the Pro and Scale plans offer substantial value compared to hiring voice talent for every project.
How to Get Started (It Takes Five Minutes)
Getting started with ElevenLabs is straightforward:
Sign up
at
elevenlabs.io
— the free account requires just an email.
Explore the Voice Library
— browse hundreds of pre-built voices across different ages, genders, accents, and styles.
Try Text-to-Speech
— paste a paragraph and listen. The quality will surprise you.
Experiment with Voice Cloning
— upload a short audio sample and create your own digital voice twin.
Test the new features
— try generating a sound effect, composing background music, or designing a completely custom voice.
For a detailed walkthrough, check out our
step-by-step ElevenLabs tutorial
on TonyCiencia. And if you want practical advice on getting the best results, our
ElevenLabs tips and best practices guide
covers everything from prompt writing to pronunciation control.
Why I Keep Coming Back to ElevenLabs

I've tested a lot of AI voice tools — some cheaper, some with flashier marketing. What keeps me using ElevenLabs is the quality-to-simplicity ratio. The voices sound incredible. The interface is clean and intuitive. New features arrive regularly and actually work well on launch day, not after three patch cycles.

There's also something to be said about a platform that respects its free users. Giving full access to features like sound effects and music generation on the free tier means you can build real projects before spending a dollar. That kind of confidence in the product speaks volumes (pun intended).

If you're building content in 2025 and you're not using AI voice technology, you're working harder than you need to. ElevenLabs makes it effortless to produce professional audio at scale, and the new multimedia features mean it's no longer just about voices — it's about creating entire audio experiences from a single dashboard.
Give ElevenLabs a try for free today
— I think you'll be as hooked as I am.

children.text: Is ElevenLabs free to use?

Yes. ElevenLabs offers a generous free tier with 10,000 credits per month that includes access to text-to-speech, speech-to-text, sound effects generation, music creation, voice design, and three projects in the production studio. Paid plans start at $6/month for additional credits and voice cloning features.
Can ElevenLabs clone my own voice?

Absolutely. ElevenLabs offers both instant voice cloning (as little as 30 seconds of audio) and professional cloning (longer samples for higher fidelity). Once cloned, you can generate speech in your voice in any supported language, which is perfect for dubbing, narration, and content localization.
How many languages does ElevenLabs support for dubbing?

ElevenLabs supports multilingual dubbing across 29+ languages. The platform preserves the original speaker's vocal identity across translations, so your dubbed content sounds like you actually speak that language — not like a generic translation overlay.
What's the difference between ElevenLabs and other AI voice tools?

ElevenLabs stands out for its voice realism, the breadth of its feature set (sound effects, music, voice design, conversational AI, and video tools all in one platform), and its generous free tier. While other tools may focus solely on text-to-speech, ElevenLabs has evolved into a comprehensive audio and multimedia creation suite.
